reviews.review_msg: Probably the worst prof I've encountered in my experience spanning community college, undergrad and graduate studies. If this is the same guy from UBC, its a shame SFU took him on.  His classes are poorly executed with scattered content and he offers very little in the way of insight.  Avoid him if possible.  He should not be an educator.

I am surprised by the reviews on this site.  He does expect a lot from his students, but I found that if you put in the effort, it was very well received.  I totally agreed with the participation mark he assigned because it forces you to keep up with the work.  I really enjoyed his class.

Completely impossible, would have failed the entire class if he could have. Easily the worst prof I have encountered. Expectations are unrealistic, assignments unclear, and tests long. He's arrogant beyond belief. VERY VERY frustrating experience. AVOID his highness at all costs.

Hooray, he's gone! Has to be one of the worst profs ever. Arrogant, unclear in what he wants for projects and extravagant expectations for 2nd/3rd year. Save yourself the pain, take another class -- if you can, with SFU's reg system!
He thinks he is god's gift to students. Extremely difficult to recieve a good mark in tutorial participation. I would never recommend taking this professor if you want to maintain a good GPA.
Horrible experience.. participation mark totally unfair
Horrible teacher. Expects way to much from class. Worst experience in SFU.
Yes I found him to be pretentious--but he does encourage those who excel and actually put effort into his classes.
Adds his own rating at rate your prof (see first rating)

He expects a lot and lets you know right from the beginning but is very approachable and helpful if you go and speak to him.  If you're prepared to put the effort in you'll get a lot out of his class.
Very Clear lecturer, its a shame b.c his attitude toward student achievement is very poor. Very imtimidating and unreasonable. In a second year class has a 20 page research paper!

Absolutley terrible proff. Acussed me of plagarism on first paper for not quoting enough.Went for help, told me to quote more. Second paper i quoted a bit more and accussed me and plagarism again saying the i wasnt using origional ideas.

Puts himself up on a pedistool and expects everyone to kiss his feet in order to do well in the class.  He is extremely inflexible and I don't think he ever wants his students to do well because if he did he'd try harder to help them.
Very Rude and arrogant.  He thinks he is better then anybody else.  Likes to put down his students.
No Comments
He is a scary man and should be avoided at absolutely all costs! He is mean and disrespectful to his students and should NOT be teaching! DO NOT TAKE HIM!!!!!!
Little more than a bully who thinks you should be honoured when he graces you with his presence.
He seems to believe that he is the greatest thing ever. He is wrong.
Unbelievable!  This man is arrogant, rude and disrespectful to his students.  Knows his stuff, too bad for the attitude - it ruins class moral.
A very mean man, not interested in anything any student has to say.  Seems to think he is hot stuff.
He thinks he is ALWAYS right.
Iwould suggest NOT taking anything with him. Not a nice guy.
He was clear, and a pretty funny guy, but he was a hard marker and seemed to only mark you well if you agreed with him. To get an A you have to devote all your time to his course.
No Comments
In three years, he is by far the worst professor I have ever even heard of; and I am even horrfiied that he is even a sessional professor!!!!!!!!!!
